'''Vir Vur''' were four-legged creatures often found roaming around [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. They were known to be trained by creature handlers to do many tricks.

==Behind the scenes==
Vir Vurs were creatures in [[Sony]] Online Entertainment's [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. For many years, Vir Vurs sometimes spawned with the incorrect name "Vir Vir". This was corrected with [[:w:c:swg:Game Update 17|Game Update 17]] in June [[2010]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Star Wars Galaxies: Game Update 17 - Empire Day VII / Remembrance Day VII">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=1100816|text=Star Wars Galaxies: Game Update 17 - Empire Day VII / Remembrance Day VII}}</ref>
